result.stdout:
Description:
  Roslyn-based code complexity analyzer for C#

Usage:
  ComplexityRipper [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  analyze  Scan repositories and generate analysis JSON
  report   Generate HTML report from analysis JSON
  run      Analyze repos and generate report in one step

commands.payload:
Description:
  Roslyn-based code complexity analyzer for C#

Usage:
  ComplexityRipper [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  analyze  Scan repositories and generate analysis JSON
  report   Generate HTML report from analysis JSON
  run      Analyze repos and generate report in one step

result.stdout:
Description:
  Scan repositories and generate analysis JSON

Usage:
  ComplexityRipper analyze [options]

Options:
  --root <root> (REQUIRED)  Root directory containing repos to analyze
  --output <output>         Output JSON file path [default: stats.json]
  --include <include>       Regex to include repos (use | for OR). Only matching repo names are analyzed
  --exclude <exclude>       Regex to exclude repos (use | for OR). Matching repo names are skipped
  --include-tests           Include test projects (excluded by default) [default: False]
  -?, -h, --help            Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Scan repositories and generate analysis JSON

Usage:
  ComplexityRipper analyze [options]

Options:
  --root <root> (REQUIRED)  Root directory containing repos to analyze
  --output <output>         Output JSON file path [default: stats.json]
  --include <include>       Regex to include repos (use | for OR). Only matching repo names are analyzed
  --exclude <exclude>       Regex to exclude repos (use | for OR). Matching repo names are skipped
  --include-tests           Include test projects (excluded by default) [default: False]
  -?, -h, --help            Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Generate HTML report from analysis JSON

Usage:
  ComplexityRipper report [options]

Options:
  --input <input>                                Input JSON file path [default: stats.json]
  --output <output>                              Output HTML file path [default: code-complexity-report.html]
  --threshold-lines <threshold-lines>            Line count threshold for flagging functions [default: 200]
  --threshold-complexity <threshold-complexity>  Cyclomatic complexity threshold for flagging functions [default: 25]
  --theme <theme>                                Report theme: light, dark, high-contrast, ink [default: light]
  --repo-metadata <repo-metadata>                Path to repo-metadata.json for lifecycle tags
  -?, -h, --help                                 Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Generate HTML report from analysis JSON

Usage:
  ComplexityRipper report [options]

Options:
  --input <input>                                Input JSON file path [default: stats.json]
  --output <output>                              Output HTML file path [default: code-complexity-report.html]
  --threshold-lines <threshold-lines>            Line count threshold for flagging functions [default: 200]
  --threshold-complexity <threshold-complexity>  Cyclomatic complexity threshold for flagging functions [default: 25]
  --theme <theme>                                Report theme: light, dark, high-contrast, ink [default: light]
  --repo-metadata <repo-metadata>                Path to repo-metadata.json for lifecycle tags
  -?, -h, --help                                 Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Analyze repos and generate report in one step

Usage:
  ComplexityRipper run [options]

Options:
  --root <root> (REQUIRED)                       Root directory containing repos to analyze
  --output <output>                              Output HTML report file path [default: code-complexity-report.html]
  --stats <stats>                                Intermediate stats JSON file path [default: stats.json]
  --threshold-lines <threshold-lines>            Line count threshold for flagging functions [default: 200]
  --threshold-complexity <threshold-complexity>  Cyclomatic complexity threshold for flagging functions [default: 25]
  --theme <theme>                                Report theme: light, dark, high-contrast, ink [default: light]
  --include <include>                            Regex to include repos (use | for OR). Only matching repo names are analyzed
  --exclude <exclude>                            Regex to exclude repos (use | for OR). Matching repo names are skipped
  --include-tests                                Include test projects (excluded by default) [default: False]
  --repo-metadata <repo-metadata>                Path to repo-metadata.json for lifecycle tags
  -?, -h, --help                                 Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Analyze repos and generate report in one step

Usage:
  ComplexityRipper run [options]

Options:
  --root <root> (REQUIRED)                       Root directory containing repos to analyze
  --output <output>                              Output HTML report file path [default: code-complexity-report.html]
  --stats <stats>                                Intermediate stats JSON file path [default: stats.json]
  --threshold-lines <threshold-lines>            Line count threshold for flagging functions [default: 200]
  --threshold-complexity <threshold-complexity>  Cyclomatic complexity threshold for flagging functions [default: 25]
  --theme <theme>                                Report theme: light, dark, high-contrast, ink [default: light]
  --include <include>                            Regex to include repos (use | for OR). Only matching repo names are analyzed
  --exclude <exclude>                            Regex to exclude repos (use | for OR). Matching repo names are skipped
  --include-tests                                Include test projects (excluded by default) [default: False]
  --repo-metadata <repo-metadata>                Path to repo-metadata.json for lifecycle tags
  -?, -h, --help                                 Show help and usage information
